titleStmt.title: SII 39.68: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 68. (A.R. No. 68 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CHITRASABHĀPATI SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE LEFT OF ENTRANCE TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KŌṈĒRIṈMAIKOṆḌĀṈ.

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of tax-free village Kaṇḍiyadēvaṉ Sundarapāṇḍya chatur[vēdimaṅgalam] made to 20 Brāhmaṇas, well versed in the vēdā sāśtrās for building Śiva and Vishṇu temples, (latter named) Kulaśēkhara-viṇṇagarĀḻvār. The grant was made at the instance of Kālingarāyaṉ. Taxes like Veṭṭipāṭṭam, Pañchupili, Taṭṭolipāṭṭam, Iḍaiyarvari were remitted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī prasādañ ceytaruḷiṉa tiru
mukappaṭi tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ
koṉeri mel koṇṭāṉ veda
mum śāstramum poy vyāvyātāk
kaḷāyirukkum caturvedibhaṭṭarkaḷ
per Irupatukku paṅku Irupatu civaliṅka
pratiṣṭhaikku paṅku Iraṇṭum vi
pratiṣṭhaikku paṅku Iraṇṭum
Āka paṅku Irupattu nālukkum puṟamalainā
ṭṭup poṉṉamarā patippaṟṟil meṟ
pāl nam muḻavāṉa maṇalūrk kiḻ
neṭuvayal melellaikku meṟku te
ṉellai tirupāṇṭiyeri vaṭavellaik
kum melellai pūṇṭi mucukkuṉṟattu E
llaikku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai
tteṉ ṉellaikkut teṟkum Āka Iṉṉā
llaikkuḷppaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñcey
nattamum toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷapparappum
nilattil paḻantevatāṉam paḷḷic can
Uḷḷa nilamum muṉṟuṭaiyārum paḻam peyarum
tup paṅku maṉaiyum Eḻutik kuṭiyirukkalām na
yanaṉai kaṇṭiya tevaṉ cuntarapāṇṭiyac catu
maṉṉum poril brahmadecañ ceyya
ṭaiyār Eṉṉum nāmattāl civaliṅka prati
kulacekara viṇṇakarāḻvār Enṉun
tiṣṭhai paṇṇavum maṇalūr
taṭi taruvatāṉa Accuk kāriya vārāṭci
yamum viṉiyokamum taruvatāṉavum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cattivi
lap peṟum Ilāñciṉaip peṟum taṟippuṭa
taṭṭoḷippāṭṭamum Iṭaiyarvari
Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uḷpaṭṭaṉa
ṟaiyiliyāka Ivvūr ṣabhaiyār Innā
koḷakkuṭi yāṇṭa nāyaṉānāṟku
Aṉupavikkavum Aṉupavittu
ppaṅku nālum
lappayir pārttu cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ ko
�lāle kalane tūṇi nellu Iṟup
ṭappeṟa veṇumeṉṟu kāliṅkarāyar
�ṉṉa maiyil taṅkaḷukkup paṅku Irupa
ṉap paṅku nālum Āka paṅku Irupattu
maṇalūr nāṉke
tevatāṉam paḷḷic cantam nikki nikki Uṉ
ṉuṭaiyārum paḻaperum Uḻavum mutali
ṅkum maṉaiyum Eḻutik kuṭiyirukka �mantac
taṉ nāyaṉāṉa kaṇṭiya tevaṉ cuntarapā
tāṅkal ṉṉum � bramā
Built in at the beginning and at bottom.
Digital edition of SII 39.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
